subject: english
text: VII. 58 .  Friendship Tree Activity Instructions: • Draw or stick a large tree on a chart. • Each student writes their name on a leaf-shaped paper and adds it to the tree. • On the leaf, write one quality of a good friend (e.g., kind, honest, funny).

subject: english
text: VIII. 59. Create a Mini-Book: “My Friend and I” Instructions: • Fold 1 A4 sheet into a mini-book (4 pages). • On each page, students can: • Page 1: Draw their friend • Page 2: Write what games they play • Page 3: A time their friend helped them • Page 4: Why they are thankful

subject: english
text: IX. 60. Friendship Acrostic Poem Instructions: • Write the word FRIEND vertically on the page. • Students create a line for each letter to describe a good friend. Example: F – Funny and full of fun R – Ready to help always I – Is kind and caring E – Enjoys playing with me N – Never tells lies D – Does good things
